calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Upsolar America, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-15-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Leslie C. Nichols; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

David Niegowski, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff Upsolar America Inc.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Planet Solar Inc.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Witness Stephene Dufrenne sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $151,183.05
Pre-Judgment Interest: $10,412.77
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $597.03
Total Judgment in the amount of $162,192.85
Judgment signed in open court.
